title: Define Environment Variable Values Using An Init Container — Rules
text:
Variable declaration: Use the form
VAR='value'
. Spaces surrounding
=
are ignored; leading spaces on a line are ignored; blank lines are ignored.
Quoted values: Values must be enclosed in single quotes (
'
).
The content inside single quotes is preserved literally. No escape-sequence processing, whitespace folding, or character interpretation is applied.
Newlines inside single quotes are preserved (multi-line values are supported).
Comments: Lines that begin with
#
are treated as comments and ignored. A
#
character inside a single-quoted value is not a comment.
The content inside single quotes is preserved literally. No escape-sequence processing, whitespace folding, or character interpretation is applied.
Newlines inside single quotes are preserved (multi-line values are supported).
Examples:
# comment
DB_ADDRESS='address'

MULTI='line1
line2'
